visible.text: There is a lever in the center of the room.

examinable.text: The lever itself nor the nearby surroundings provide no indication as to what the lever does

visible.text: An oddly torn maintenance log is caught underneath a damaged and scorched fuse panel.

readable.text:
Maintenance Log: 
Primary breaker instability detected. 
Emergency fuse was removed to prevent systems failure. 
Replacement fuse has been relocated to  ̷ȍ̷̸̸̷̷̧͔͉̙͖͎͈̗̖̺̟̘̤̱̓͊ͭͭͣ̉ͪ̓̐̆̔ͩ͒͜͠͞v̷̶̶̢̮̼͙̖̤̀ͮ͑ͪͦͦͮ͘͜ͅ_̸̷̢̠͖͋ͧͬ̆͝͡e̷̵̡̝͕̦͇̲̬̩͉̋́ͩͦ͑ͥ̾̾̎̐̓ͅ_ ̵̧̜͕̖͕̫͇̃̂̓ͤͭ̃ͤ_̵̷̢̦̗̜̠̳̼̪̳͎̅̉̋ͮ̏ͤͅổ̷̸̷̷͓̞͙̱̲̰̭̲̃̈́̎͛ͣͬ̑̃ͅͅf̷̦̙̀̐͛͂̄_̧̥͈̈́_̸̴̴̸̢͍͕̲͍̬̯̙̺̳̞̝̣̬͊̃̀̓͐̄̓̄ͧ̓͑̆̓ͣ̓ͨ̾ͦ͛̚͜͡͠͝͡͡ ̸̸̸̨̧̛̘͇̘̹̣̤͍̎̽̾̀ͫͯ̉͆̉̇͆̀ͨ͟͞.
The rest of the document is nowhere to be found

takeable.text: You take the torn document, and place it in your inventory.

visible.text: There is a note on the ground titled 'Hello World'.

readable.text:
You hold the 'Hello World' note in your hand.
'The password is FOOBAR.'

takeable.text: You take the 'Hello World' note in your hand, and put it in your inventory.

visible.text: There is a keycard on the table.

usable.text: You put the Red Keycard into the reader. It fits perfectly!

takeable.text: You take the Red Keycard in your hand, and put it in your inventory.
